case_title: SYLVIA TERRY CHIN VS. APRIA HEALTHCARE GROUP, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL L. MAU. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY STEVEN BUCHER--SENIOR ACCT. MGR. AND MICHAEL CHRADLE--BRANCH MGR.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL L. MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIN, SYLVIA TERRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT APRIA HEALTHCARE GROUP, INC. $508.96 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $568.96, JUDGMENT FOR $350.96 PLUS $158 EQUALS $508.96; DEFENDANT CAN SATISFY JUDGMENT BY CREDITING PLAINTIFF'S ACCOUNT TO REFLECT A ZERO POST DUE BALANCED IN ITS FEB 2013 STATEMENT; I.E. CREDITING $508.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
